entities.name: Zagam

attributes.role: demonic spirit invoked in love magic

entities.raw_quote: O Zagam, accept this dove which I sacrifice to you!

entities.name: Astaroth

attributes.function: has power to bind man and woman in love

entities.raw_quote: O Astaroth, prince of the south, I conjure you with all the [spirits] under your command...

entities.name: Aroch

attributes.role: companion spirit to Astaroth in conjuration

entities.raw_quote: ...Astaroth, Aroch, Godras, [and] Vynicon.

entities.name: Godras

attributes.role: companion spirit to Astaroth in conjuration

entities.raw_quote: ...Astaroth, Aroch, Godras, [and] Vynicon.

entities.name: Vynicon

attributes.role: companion spirit to Astaroth in conjuration

entities.raw_quote: ...Astaroth, Aroch, Godras, [and] Vynicon.

entities.name: Tubal

attributes.role: one of six hot spirits invoked on image for love magic

entities.raw_quote: ...in the name of these six hot spirits, namely Tubal, Satan, Reuces, Cupido, Afalion, Duliatus...

entities.name: Satan

attributes.role: inscribed on image’s right arm in love ritual

entities.raw_quote: Then write on her right arm ‘Satan’, and on her left arm ‘Reuces’.

entities.name: Reuces

attributes.role: inscribed on image’s left arm in love ritual

entities.raw_quote: Then write on her right arm ‘Satan’, and on her left arm ‘Reuces’.

entities.name: Cupido

attributes.role: inscribed on image’s genitals to arouse desire

entities.raw_quote: When you have done this, write on the genitals of the image the name ‘Cupid’, saying...

entities.name: Afalion
entities.raw_quote: When you have said this, write on the right leg ‘Afalion’, and on the left leg ‘Duliatus’.

entities.name: Duliatus
entities.raw_quote: When you have said this, write on the right leg ‘Afalion’, and on the left leg ‘Duliatus’.

entities.name: Sobedon

attributes.role: lord to whom demons are bound in obedience

entities.raw_quote: ...by your lords to whom you are bound in obedience – Sobedon, Badalam and Berith...

entities.name: Badalam

attributes.role: lord to whom demons are bound in obedience

entities.raw_quote: ...by your lords to whom you are bound in obedience – Sobedon, Badalam and Berith...

entities.name: Berith

attributes.role: lord to whom demons are bound in obedience

entities.raw_quote: ...by your lords to whom you are bound in obedience – Sobedon, Badalam and Berith...

entities.name: Rator

attributes.role: named in protective circle; part of circle names

entities.raw_quote: The circle is shown as a single band containing the names Rator, Lampoy, Despan, Brunlo, Dronoth, Maloqui, Satola, Gelbid, Mascifin, Nartim and Lodoni.

entities.name: Lampoy
entities.raw_quote: ...Rator, Lampoy, Despan...

entities.name: Despan
entities.raw_quote: ...Rator, Lampoy, Despan...

entities.name: Brunlo
entities.raw_quote: ...Rator, Lampoy, Despan, Brunlo...

entities.name: Dronoth
entities.raw_quote: ...Brunlo, Dronoth, Maloqui...

entities.name: Maloqui
entities.raw_quote: ...Dronoth, Maloqui, Satola...

entities.name: Satola
entities.raw_quote: ...Maloqui, Satola, Gelbid...

entities.name: Gelbid
entities.raw_quote: ...Satola, Gelbid, Mascifin...

entities.name: Mascifin
entities.raw_quote: ...Gelbid, Mascifin, Nartim...

entities.name: Nartim
entities.raw_quote: ...Mascifin, Nartim and Lodoni.

entities.name: Lodoni
entities.raw_quote: ...Nartim and Lodoni.

entities.name: Place of the Master
entities.raw_quote: The centre of the circle is labelled ‘Place of the Master’.

entities.name: Munich Handbook (CLM 849)
entities.raw_quote: Our necromantic manual in Clm 849 includes four experiments said to induce love...

entities.name: Liber de angelis

attributes.role: source of parallel love magic experiment involving Zagam

entities.raw_quote: An experiment for love in the Liber de angelis requires going to a crossroads or a gallows...

entities.name: amor hereos

attributes.role: Latin term for burning, indissoluble love

entities.raw_quote: ...in Latin such love is called ‘amor hereos’, and is burning and indissoluble.

entities.name: allectory
entities.raw_quote: ...such as the stone allectory and the herb henbane.

entities.name: henbane
entities.raw_quote: ...such as the stone allectory and the herb henbane.

entities.name: St John’s wort
entities.raw_quote: ...various herbs were used as aphrodisiacs (St John’s wort, valerian, vervain)...

entities.name: valerian
entities.raw_quote: ...various herbs were used as aphrodisiacs (St John’s wort, valerian, vervain)...

entities.name: vervain
entities.raw_quote: ...various herbs were used as aphrodisiacs (St John’s wort, valerian, vervain)...

entities.name: myrrh
entities.raw_quote: When you have said this, take myrrh and saffron, kindle a fire, and fumigate the image...

entities.name: saffron
entities.raw_quote: ...take myrrh and saffron, kindle a fire, and fumigate the image...

entities.name: white dove

attributes.role: sacrificed; blood used to inscribe image

entities.raw_quote: ...have a totally white dove and a parchment made from a female dog that is in heat...

entities.name: female dog (in heat)

attributes.role: source of parchment for love image

entities.raw_quote: ...a parchment made from a female dog that is in heat, from whom it is most easily to be had...

entities.name: eagle’s quill
entities.raw_quote: You should also have a quill from an eagle.

entities.name: iron stylus
entities.raw_quote: Take an iron stylus and trace [a band with names in it] round the circle...

entities.name: iron chain

attributes.role: used to bind image of dignitary to magician’s image

entities.raw_quote: ...second binding the dignitary’s image to the magician’s own with a small iron chain...

entities.name: horsehair
entities.raw_quote: Take a hair from the tail of a horse and suspend the parchment with this hair...

entities.name: sword (for circle)
entities.raw_quote: Take a sword and make with it a circle on the ground.

entities.name: ring (ritual)
entities.raw_quote: When you have said this three times, gazing at a ring, you will hear a voice...

entities.name: wax image

attributes.role: used in love magic and judicial cases

entities.raw_quote: ...a second figure out of wax and baptizing it as well...

entities.name: circle (ritual)

attributes.role: protective space for conjuration; also used to receive woman

entities.raw_quote: ...make a circle on the ground... stand inside it...

entities.name: Parmenides

attributes.role: legendary figure cited as user of image magic

entities.raw_quote: Parmen[i]des used this experiment to obtain favour from the king of the Persians.

entities.name: Oldradus da Ponte

attributes.role: fourteenth-century author on demonic love magic

entities.raw_quote: Oldradus da Ponte explained in the early fourteenth century that invoking demons to tempt women is mortally sinful...

entities.name: Peter Recordi

attributes.role: Carmelite friar tried for erotic magic

entities.raw_quote: When the Carmelite friar Peter Recordi was tried by an inquisitorial tribunal at Carcassonne in 1329...

entities.name: William Netherstreet

attributes.role: English chaplain accused of erotic necromancy

entities.raw_quote: ...an English chaplain named William Netherstreet was charged in 1377...

entities.name: Geraud Cassendi

attributes.role: notary tried for demonic love magic

entities.raw_quote: At Carcassonne in 1410, Geraud Cassendi, a notary, was tried by an inquisitor...

entities.name: Agnolo di Corso

attributes.role: magician who invoked Satan and Beelzebub

entities.raw_quote: ...one Agnolo di Corso had worshipped and invoked Satan and Beelzebub...

entities.name: Alice Kyteler

attributes.role: woman accused of using demonic materials for erotic magic

entities.raw_quote: In 1324 Alice Kyteler was charged with using ‘the intestines and innards of cocks sacrificed … to demons’...

entities.name: Tournai trial (late 15th c.)
entities.raw_quote: The case from Tournai is highly reminiscent of the Netherlandish experiment mentioned earlier...

entities.name: Tristan and Iseult

attributes.role: literary figures illustrating symbolic use of love magic

entities.raw_quote: ...in Thomas of Britain’s version of Tristan the love potion seems to function as a symbol...

entities.name: Krishna
entities.raw_quote: ...Krishna is said to have used his powers of illusion (ma-ya-) to fashion replicas...

summary: This chunk details necromantic love magic from the Munich Handbook (CLM 849), focusing on a complex ritual involving inscribed parchment images, demon conjurations, and protective circles. It includes named spirits (e.g., Tubal, Satan, Astaroth, Zagam) used in sympathetic and coercive operations to compel love or bring victims to the magician. The text also references judicial cases and parallels with other grimoires like the Liber de angelis.
key_passages: ‘I draw so-and-so, N., daughter of so-and-so, whom I wish to have, in the name of these six hot spirits, namely Tubal, Satan, Reuces, Cupido, Afalion, Duliatus, that she may love me above all others living in this world.’
O Zagam, accept this dove which I sacrifice to you! ... I ask you, O Zagam, and all your companions, to bring forth [the desired woman]...

The circle is shown as a single band containing the names Rator, Lampoy, Despan, Brunlo, Dronoth, Maloqui, Satola, Gelbid, Mascifin, Nartim and Lodoni. The centre of the circle is labelled ‘Place of the Master’.
I conjure you demons inscribed in this circle... by these names which cause you terror, namely Rator, Lampoy, [etc.]...
When she enters the circle and you greet her, remember to touch her with the image that you have around your neck, and on this account she will love you for all eternity...
